# Sahil Shekh - Frontend Angular Developer Portfolio

Owner: Sahil Shekh
Website: https://www.sahilshekh.github.io/
Role: Frontend Developer (Angular)
Location: India
Experience: 1.5+ Years

## About
This website is the personal portfolio of Sahil Shekh, a Frontend Developer specializing in Angular development. 
It showcases professional experience, technical skills, and project work.

## Skills
- Angular
- TypeScript
- JavaScript
- HTML5
- CSS3
- SCSS
- RESTful API Integration
- Unit Testing
- Performance Optimization
- SEO Optimization
- Git & GitHub

## Experience
Worked on production-level Angular applications.
Followed best coding practices and standards.
Collaborated closely with backend teams for REST API integration.
Worked with UX/UI designers to implement responsive and user-friendly interfaces.
Optimized applications for performance and SEO.
Contributed to unit testing and debugging.
